zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Booth於大約1358年出生在英國英格蘭恩布利亞巴頓時，他的父親Sir Thomas Booth Of Barton40歲，母親Elena Ellen de Workesley11356歲。他於大約1370年與Eleanor de Trafford在英國藍卡爾巴頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1422年3月在英國英格蘭藍卡爾文馬爾享年65歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特武德內斯波洛聖 瑪麗 馮 維金 亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Booth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): topographic or occupational name from Middle English bothe (Old Danish bōth) ‘temporary shelter, such as a covered market stall or a cattle-herdsman's hut’. The latter sense was predominant in the Pennines of Lancashire and Yorkshire, where there were many cattle farms or vaccaries, and whose subdivisions were known as ‘booths’. The principal meaning of the surname there was therefore probably ‘cattle herdsman’, ‘man in charge of a vaccary’, and thus identical with Boothman . Elsewhere it may have denoted a shopkeeper who owned a temporary market stall, but no evidence has been found to confirm this use of the surname. In the British Isles the surname is still more common in northern England, where Scandinavian influence was more marked, and in Scotland, where the word was borrowed into Gaelic as both(an).
History: Robert Booth (1604–72) is mentioned in the colonial records of Exeter, NH, in 1645. He subsequently moved to ME.

variants.name: Boothman
meanings: English (northern): occupational name from Middle English both (Old Danish bōth) ‘temporary shelter, such as a covered market stall or a cattle-herdsman's hut’ + man. In the Pennine uplands of northern England, where booths were subdivisons of vaccaries or cattle-rearing establishment, the name probably denoted a herdsman who looked after cattle, perhaps a man in charge of a vaccary. Elsewhere the surname might have denoted a shopkeeper but evidence for this lacking. Alternatively, the name can also be an occupational name for a servant of a man surnamed Booth .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Booth was born about 1358, in Barton, Cumbria, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Thomas Booth Of Barton, was 40 and his mother, Elena Ellen de Workesley, was 11356. He married Eleanor de Trafford about 1370, in Barton, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in March 1422, in Winmarleigh, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 65, and was buried in St. Mary The Virgin Churchyard, Woodnesborough, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

ko.Saint Mary The Virgin Churchyard, Eccles: 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 우드네스버루그h 스트. 메리 테 버긴 c후르c히아어드
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Booth(이)가 대략 1358년 영국 잉글랜드 c브리아 바턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Booth Of Barton(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Elena Ellen de Workesley(은)는 11356세였다. 그는 대략 1370년 영국 랭카실르 바턴에서 Eleanor de Trafford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1422년 3월 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 윈마리에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 우드네스버루그h 스트. 메리 테 버긴 c후르c히아어드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Booth nasceu aproximadamente 1358, em Barton, Cumbria, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Thomas Booth Of Barton, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Elena Ellen de Workesley, tinha 11356 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor de Trafford aproximadamente 1370, em Barton, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em março de 1422, em Winmarleigh, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em St. Mary The Virgin Churchyard, Woodnesborough, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Booth родился около 1358 г. в местности бартон, кумбря, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Booth Of Barton было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Elena Ellen de Workesley, 11356. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor de Trafford около 1370 г. в местности бартон, ланкашир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер марта 1422 г. в местности винмарлиг, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности ст. мэри т виргин чурчярд, вуднесбороую, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.
